title: leonotis ocymifolia var. ocymifolia
intro: Leonotis ocymifolia var. ocymifolia, also known as Lion's Tail or Wild Dagga, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as insomnia, restlessness, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Leonotis ocymifolia var. ocymifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, menstrual cramps, and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Leonotis ocymifolia var. ocymifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
